name: resume-in-review
description: Issue reference triggers skill activation without restarting work
expected_behavior: Announces it is using the /work-on-issue skill
Confirms context with the user before proceeding
Does not create a new branch or PR in the first response
future_multi_turn_behavior: Sees the issue is already In Review
Tells the user it's in review
Asks what they'd like to do
Does not restart analysis or development
